verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes gentes, plaudite manibus ;  jubilate Deo in voce exsultationis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּֽל־הָ֭עַמִּים תִּקְעוּ־כָ֑ף הָרִ֥יעוּ לֵ֝אלֹהִ֗ים בְּק֣וֹל רִנָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: O clap your hands, all ye people; shout unto God with the voice of triumph.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam Dominus excelsus, terribilis,  rex magnus super omnem terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־יְהֹוָ֣ה עֶלְי֣וֹן נוֹרָ֑א מֶ֥לֶךְ גָּ֝ד֗וֹל עַל־כׇּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: For the Lord most high is terrible; he is a great King over all the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Subjecit populos nobis,  et gentes sub pedibus nostris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַדְבֵּ֣ר עַמִּ֣ים תַּחְתֵּ֑ינוּ וּ֝לְאֻמִּ֗ים תַּ֣חַת רַגְלֵֽינוּ׃
verses.king_james: He shall subdue the people under us, and the nations under our feet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Elegit nobis hæreditatem suam ;  speciem Jacob quam dilexit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִבְחַר־לָ֥נוּ אֶת־נַחֲלָתֵ֑נוּ אֶ֥ת־גְּא֨וֹן יַעֲקֹ֖ב אֲשֶׁר־אָהֵ֣ב סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: He shall choose our inheritance for us, the excellency of Jacob whom he loved. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ascendit Deus in jubilo,  et Dominus in voce tubæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָלָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים בִּתְרוּעָ֑ה יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה בְּק֣וֹל שׁוֹפָֽר׃
verses.king_james: God is gone up with a shout, the Lord with the sound of a trumpet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Psallite Deo nostro, psallite ;  psallite regi nostro, psallite :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זַמְּר֣וּ אֱלֹהִ֣ים זַמֵּ֑רוּ זַמְּר֖וּ לְמַלְכֵּ֣נוּ זַמֵּֽרוּ׃
verses.king_james: Sing praises to God, sing praises: sing praises unto our King, sing praises.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam rex omnis terræ Deus,  psallite sapienter.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י מֶ֖לֶךְ כׇּל־הָאָ֥רֶץ אֱלֹהִ֗ים זַמְּר֥וּ מַשְׂכִּֽיל׃
verses.king_james: For God is the King of all the earth: sing ye praises with understanding.

verses.latin_vulgate: Regnabit Deus super gentes ;  Deus sedet super sedem sanctam suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מָלַ֣ךְ אֱ֭לֹהִים עַל־גּוֹיִ֑ם אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים יָשַׁ֤ב ׀ עַל־כִּסֵּ֬א קׇדְשֽׁוֹ׃
verses.king_james: God reigneth over the heathen: God sitteth upon the throne of his holiness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Principes populorum congregati sunt cum Deo Abraham,  quoniam dii fortes terræ vehementer elevati sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נְדִ֘יבֵ֤י עַמִּ֨ים ׀ נֶאֱסָ֗פוּ עַם֮ אֱלֹהֵ֢י אַבְרָ֫הָ֥ם כִּ֣י לֵ֭אלֹהִים מָֽגִנֵּי־אֶ֗רֶץ מְאֹ֣ד נַעֲלָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: The princes of the people are gathered together, even the people of the God of Abraham: for the shields of the earth belong unto God: he is greatly exalted.
